examples: The heir on taking up his ancestors fief had to pay a relief .
And in the Yuan Dynasty, it was the fief of Genghis Khan's descendants.
Mr Putin's man in Chechnya, Ramzan Kadyrov, treats his republic like a fief.
Ismail Khan, the ruler of Herat, has expressed concern over the fiery suicides in his fief.
And at least half-a-dozen places, including the senior Lebed's fief of Krasnoyarsk, are imposing price controls.
